intro.title: AI Virtual Receptionist for Hotels and Accommodation

blocks.heading: A Smarter Way to Manage Guest Communication
blocks.description: At VirtualAssistant.com.au, we understand that in hospitality, every call is an opportunity to make a lasting impression. Whether you manage a boutique hotel, luxury resort, serviced apartment, caravan park, or Airbnb property, our AI Virtual Receptionist ensures every guest receives prompt, professional, and personalized service. It handles reservations, answers guest questions, and manages after-hours communication — all while matching your brand's tone and guest experience.

blocks.heading: Focus on Guests, Not the Phone
blocks.description: Your AI Receptionist handles calls and inquiries while your staff focuses on check-ins, guest service, and operations. It can respond instantly to questions like 'Do you have vacancies this weekend?', 'What time is check-in?', or 'Do you offer late checkout?' with accurate and friendly information. It can also confirm bookings, provide room availability, manage group requests, and send reservation confirmations automatically.

blocks.heading: Never Miss a Booking or Guest Inquiry
blocks.description: Even when your reception desk is closed or busy, your AI Receptionist ensures every guest inquiry is handled promptly. It provides details about room types, amenities, parking, breakfast options, and local attractions — and can guide guests through booking directly via your system. Whether you manage one Airbnb or multiple hotel properties, you'll never lose a potential booking again.

whyChooseUs.title: Why Hotels and Accommodation Providers Choose VirtualAssistant.com.au
whyChooseUs.description: Our AI Virtual Receptionist is trusted by hotels, motels, resorts, and accommodation providers across Australia — from boutique properties to large resorts and Airbnb managers. It integrates seamlessly with booking platforms like Booking.com, Expedia, and Airbnb, as well as your existing PMS or calendar system. Best of all, your AI Receptionist can be trained to your exact workflow and brand voice — offering consistent, high-quality communication that reflects your hospitality standards. Let our AI manage your calls, bookings, and guest questions so you can focus on creating exceptional guest experiences every time.

card.heading: Simplify Guest Notes and Follow-Ups
card.description: After each stay or guest interaction, your team can record a short voice memo that's automatically transcribed and summarized — perfect for noting special requests or VIP preferences. You can upload booking details, maintenance notes, or feedback directly into your dashboard, ensuring seamless guest service and team coordination.
